use_cases: Celebrate successful user signups or account creation with a confetti burst
Mark order completion or purchase confirmation with an animated celebration
Highlight product feature releases or successful uploads
Reward milestone achievements like streaks, goals, or badges earned
Add visual delight to content publication or posting success
ai_summary: A lightweight confetti celebration overlay component using Lottie animations for visual feedback. Renders a fixed full-screen confetti effect that can be toggled via the isActive prop, with configurable duration, z-index, and looping. Perfect for celebrating user actions like signups, purchases, or achievements in SaaS, e-commerce, and creator platform applications.
